News

Gavin raises private parking issues with industry body

Friday, 24 April, 2026
Sir Gavin Williamson recently met with the Chief Executive of a leading industry body to discuss concerns regarding an increase in parking tickets across Staffordshire – particularly in Great Wyrley and Penkridge. Sir Gavin and Will Hurley, the CEO and founder of the International Parking Community (IPC) reiterated their shared keenness for private parking companies to operate fairly, and ensure...
